hooks.command: file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *.sh) shellcheck "$file";; *.md) case "$file" in */.claude/*|*/external-skills*|*/skills*) ;; *) markdownlint-cli2 "$file";; esac;; *.json) node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8'))" -- "$file";; *.yaml|*.yml) yaml valid "$file";; esac
